title: Ubiquiti UVC-Doorbell-Lite-B, UniFi Protect video doorbell, black
category: Ubiquiti / Cameras, security / Videophones and bells / Door Bells
description: The Ubiquiti Doorbell Lite is a compact UniFi Protect video doorbell featuring a 5MP camera , 95.8° field of view, IR illumination for night vision up to 5m , a weather-resistant enclosure , built-in microphone and speaker for two-way audio communication . Power and network connectivity are provided via (1) 10/100Mbps PoE-In port for connection to a UniFi Protect system 5MP 24fps video (1920 x 2560 px) IR night vision up to 5m IPX5 weather-resistant housing Two-way audio with noise cancellation Powered via 37-57V PoE Device Mounting bracket Angled mounting bracket Mounting hardware
